name: Messaging Bridge
description: Unified messaging bridge: connects NeuroCore to Telegram, Discord, Signal, and WhatsApp.

provides_nodes.name: Messaging Input
provides_nodes.description: Receives input from any configured messaging platform (Telegram, Discord, Signal, WhatsApp). Configure to filter by specific platforms.

provides_nodes.name: Messaging Output
provides_nodes.description: Sends the final response back via the platform the message originated from, or a configured override platform.
